news.summary: Lovesac Company (NASDAQ: LOVE) saw a decrease in shares after posting its first-quarter results. The furniture retailer reported a loss of 73 cents per share, surpassing the estimated loss of 83 cents. Sales for the quarter totaled $138.37 million, up by 4.3% compared to the previous year, beating the consensus estimate of $137 million. The growth was driven by an 18.2% rise in showroom sales, offsetting an 8.9% decline in internet sales. Gross profit rose by 3.2% year over year to $74.4 million, with a gross margin drop of 60 basis points to 53.7% of net sales in Q1 of fiscal year 2026, compared to 54.3% in the same period last year. This decline was primarily due to a 230-basis-point decrease in...
news.headline: Lovesac Co. (NASDAQ: LOVE) ends Best Buy partnership, issues weak forecast after reporting Q1 loss of 73 cents/share, sales of $138.37M (+4.3% YoY). Gross profit up 3.2% to $74.4M, margin declined to 53.7%. Showroom sales up 18.2%, internet sales down 8.9%.

news.summary: Exciting news coming out of Cincinnati on June 12, 2025, where Pickleball Kingdom is set to unveil its cutting-edge indoor pickleball venue at 12130 Royal Point Drive. The grand opening is scheduled for Saturday, June 21, 2025. This facility promises to offer top-notch amenities for pickleball enthusiasts in the area.
news.headline: Pickleball Kingdom in Cincinnati Mason to open new indoor facility at 12130 Royal Point Drive on June 21, 2025.

news.summary: Schneider National, Inc. (NYSE: SNDR), based in Green Bay, Wisconsin, is commemorating its 90th anniversary. Originally starting with just one truck in 1935, the company has grown to become a leading multimodal transportation, logistics, and intermodal services provider. A special event on June 12 at their headquarters is dedicated to celebrating this significant milestone. The event pays tribute to the company's history, the individuals who have contributed to its success, and its bright future ahead. Al Schneider founded the company with a vision that has led to its remarkable journey over the years.
news.headline: Schneider National, Inc. celebrates 90 years of growth and innovation in transportation industry, from one truck in 1935 to industry leader today. Event held at Green Bay HQ.

news.summary: In Naperville, Illinois, Oncourse Home Solutions has been honored with the prestigious Carrier President’s Award for the fifth year in a row. This national accolade acknowledges Carrier dealers who demonstrate exceptional performance in business management, customer satisfaction, HVAC knowledge, and overall operational efficiency. The award recognizes companies that uphold high standards in the industry and aim to improve their operational processes. This annual award highlights Oncourse Home Solutions' commitment to excellence in various aspects of their business, showcasing their dedication to providing top-notch services.
news.headline: Oncourse Home Solutions in Naperville, Ill., wins Carrier President’s Award for 5th year, recognized for excellence.

news.summary: In Seattle, CORT Party Rental, a top event rental provider in the Pacific Northwest, was lauded at the 2025 Emerald City Applause Awards by ILEA Seattle Chapter. The company clinched three significant awards: Best Creative Solution, Excellence in Sustainability, and Event Professional of the Year. These accolades highlight CORT Party Rental's reputation as a reliable and inventive partner for event experts in the Pacific region.
news.headline: CORT Party Rental wins 3 awards at 2025 Emerald City Applause Awards by ILEA Seattle, including Best Creative Solution.

news.summary: In Sacramento, applications are now being accepted for the CalAssist Mortgage Fund, a $105 million program designed to aid California homeowners affected by recent disasters. Administered by the California Housing Finance Agency (CalHFA), the fund will offer up to $20,000 in assistance, equivalent to three months of mortgage payments, to eligible homeowners. Those from low- to middle-income households who have been displaced from their destroyed or uninhabitable homes may qualify for this relief initiative.
news.headline: CalAssist Mortgage Fund offers $105M relief to California homeowners impacted by disasters, providing up to $20,000 for three months of payments.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, Snappt revealed at NAA Apartmentalize the introduction of Verification of Rent (VOR) powered by Trigo. Alongside VOR, Snappt is broadening its offerings with improved Verification of Assets (VOA) and the ability to link bank accounts. This expansion is made possible through a collaboration with Mastercard’s open banking platform provided by Finicity. These developments are part of Snappt’s extended Applicant Trust Platform, highlighting its commitment to enhancing trust in multifamily housing.
news.headline: Snappt teams with Trigo for AI-enabled Verification of Rent to combat fraud, introduces VOR & VOA supported by Mastercard.

news.summary: A company based in Irvine, California, known as Alorica, recently achieved recognition for its exceptional employee experience. They were honored with CMP Research's prestigious Best of the Best Employee Experience award at the CCW Excellence Awards. This award signifies Alorica's outstanding efforts in creating a positive work environment for its employees. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to providing a top-tier experience for its workforce, fostering a culture of excellence and satisfaction within the organization.
news.headline: Alorica wins Best of the Best Employee Experience at CCW Excellence Awards, recognized by CMP Research.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Fireflies.ai, a leading AI teammate for meetings utilized by individuals in 75% of Fortune 500 firms, disclosed it has achieved a valuation surpassing $1 billion subsequent to its initial tender offer. Additionally, the company introduced a collaboration with Perplexity to introduce voice-activated, instantaneous web search functionalities into meetings with "Talk to Fireflies." This innovation allows individuals to seamlessly tap into global knowledge during discussions.
news.headline: Fireflies.ai reaches $1B valuation, partners with Perplexity for real-time web search in meetings. #AI #Fortune500

news.summary: A partnership has been established between the Wellcome Sanger Institute, Parse Biosciences, and Helmholtz Munich to develop a comprehensive cancer plasticity cell atlas. This collaborative effort aims to provide in-depth insights into the cellular composition of cancer, utilizing advanced technologies and expertise from the three institutions. By pooling together resources and knowledge, they plan to map out the diverse cell types present in cancer tissues, with the goal of enhancing understanding of cancer progression and treatment. This initiative brings together experts from Cambridge, England, and Seattle to contribute their unique capabilities. The combined efforts of this collaboration will enable the analysis of a significant number of cells, enhancing research efforts in the field of cancer biology.
news.headline: Sanger Institute, Parse Biosciences, Helmholtz Munich collaborate on Cancer Plasticity Atlas to predict therapy response.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Udemy, an AI-powered skills development platform listed on Nasdaq as UDMY, has introduced a series of AI Packages to assist organizations and professionals in enhancing their AI proficiency. These new packages offer comprehensive skills training to expedite the AI journey for businesses, showcasing Udemy as a reliable partner for upskilling and reskilling. With a broad reach of almost 80 million learners and over 17,000 organizations worldwide, Udemy remains dedicated to empowering individuals and companies in navigating the realm of artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Udemy introduces AI Fluency Packages to aid workforce transformation, aiding 80M+ learners and 17K+ organizations globally.

news.summary: A health system client located in San Mateo, California has shown significant performance in relation to the CMS TEAM bundles. The client, affiliated with CCGroup, has achieved commendable results in delivering healthcare services. news.summary: The gaming industry is undergoing a transformation with the integration of artificial intelligence (AI), but blockchain technology is seen as the crucial element for advancing next-generation, AI-driven social gaming ventures. Current centralized systems are constraining growth by imposing restrictions on innovation, user ownership, and creative potential. Decentralized solutions enabled by blockchain are anticipated to unlock new possibilities in gaming, offering enhanced social interactions and immersive experiences. This shift reflects a promising future for the gaming sector, as it embraces the potential of AI and blockchain technologies to revolutionize the industry.
news.headline: Blockchain is the key for AI-powered social gaming. Centralized systems restrain innovation.

news.summary: The Saudi Government and Seha Virtual Hospital have chosen Lunit INSIGHT CXR to identify respiratory illnesses in millions of pilgrims, aiding Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 healthcare plan. This decision was made in SEOUL, South Korea, on June 12, 2025. Lunit (KRX:328130.KQ), a prominent AI provider, will play a crucial role in this initiative.
news.headline: Lunit's AI technology, INSIGHT CXR, chosen for mass screening during 2025 Hajj season in Saudi Arabia to detect respiratory diseases among millions of pilgrims. Vision 2030 healthcare strategy supported. (Characters: 206)

news.summary: The Global Implantable Remote Patient Monitoring Devices Market is projected to grow from $7.6 billion in 2024 to $20.3 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 21.7%. This market analysis segments devices into cardiovascular, brain, gastrointestinal, hematological, respiratory, and musculoskeletal monitoring devices, where indications include cardiovascular diseases, brain disorders, and diabetes. End users are hospitals, clinics, and home healthcare settings. The report provides insights on the competitive landscape, regional analysis, consumer trends, and supply chain analysis. Factors driving market growth include the rise in chronic diseases, aging population, demand for mHealth apps, and advancements in wireless technologies like 5G. Implantable remote patient monitoring devices are transforming healthcare by improving patient outcomes, lowering costs, and enhancing accessibility through continuous monitoring and early complication detection.
news.headline: Global Implantable Remote Patient Monitoring Devices Market to reach $20.3 billion by 2029, with a 21.7% CAGR growth.

news.summary: The U.S. dollar has weakened to its lowest level in over two years, with the U.S. dollar index dropping to 97.60 on Thursday, the lowest since late March 2022. This drop was driven by evidence of disinflation and labor market weaknesses, leading economists to call for the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates. Economic reports showed inflation cooling among consumers and producers, with jobless claims surging to multi-year highs. The Producer Price Index rose 2.6% in May from a year earlier, matching expectations but only slightly higher than April's figure. Core PPI, which excludes food and energy prices, cooled to 3.0% year-over-year. The Consumer Price Index for May rose 2.4% annually. These figures suggest soft inflationary pressures despite tariff concerns. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Urgent warning as dollar hits 2-year low at 97.60, prompting calls for Fed to cut interest rates amid cooling inflation.

news.summary: A recent report by The Insight Partners reveals a substantial rise in the global EV connector market due to the growing incorporation of electronics and infotainment systems in automotive vehicles. The report, released on June 12, 2025, highlights the surge in demand for EV connectors as more vehicles integrate advanced technologies. Key findings suggest a remarkable increase in market size and a positive outlook for the industry, indicating notable growth opportunities. This trend underscores the shift towards electric vehicles and advanced automotive connectivity solutions.
news.headline: Global EV connector market expected to reach USD 12.39 billion by 2031 with 25.3% CAGR growth, driven by increasing EV industry integration of electronics.

news.summary: Today, Hypertec, a Canadian company specializing in sustainable AI infrastructure, revealed its plans to expand into Europe by establishing the first joint AI factory deployment outside of North America. This deployment is expected to provide up to 2 gigawatts of data center capacity and house as many as 100,000 GPUs. This move marks a significant milestone for Hypertec as it ventures into a new market to further its presence in the AI industry. The company's foray into Europe signifies a strategic expansion effort to enhance its operations and cater to a broader customer base, solidifying its status as a global leader in AI infrastructure solutions.
news.headline: Hypertec partners with 5C and Together AI for $5 billion investments in Europe, deploying 2 GW data center capacity and up to 100,000 GPUs.

news.summary: Sandler Partners, a prominent independent Technology Distributor, has expanded their team by hiring Fred Silva as the Director of Channel for the Southwest region. This announcement was made on June 12, 2025, in Redondo Beach, California. Sandler Partners is known for being the top Technology Solutions Distributor.
news.headline: Sandler Partners hires Fred Silva as Director, Channel - Southwest, to grow their team. Based in Redondo Beach, CA.

news.summary: In London on June 12, 2025, Element Materials Technology (Element), a prominent company in independent testing, inspection, and certification (TIC) services globally, has been acknowledged as a key player in the TIC market on the 360Quadrants platform by MarketsandMarkets™.
news.headline: June 12, 2025: Element Materials Technology acknowledged in TIC market by 360Quadrants. Leader in testing, inspection, certification.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, a resident of Warren, N.J., shared the creation of a new innovation called the ZALM, aiming to provide a wireless solution for gentle back scratching or tickling. The inventor mentioned that the device was designed to remove the difficulties of using traditional back scratchers that require straining and manual holding. The ZALM is currently patent-pending, offering a novel approach to addressing the inconvenience of back scratching.
news.headline: Innovator from NJ invents ZALM wireless back scratching device, eliminates need to strain, patent-pending.

news.summary: In Orrville, Ohio on June 12, 2025 - Jarrett, a family-owned third-party logistics (3PL) provider, has revealed a key partnership with 1Logtech to introduce Jarrett LINC (Logistics Integration, No Code). This new venture combines Jarrett's expertise with 1Logtech's AI-powered integration platform to enhance logistical operations.
news.headline: Jarrett partners with 1Logtech to launch Jarrett LINC, a digital innovation venture. Family-owned 3PL based in Ohio.

news.summary: A recent study conducted independently revealed that the impact of the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon saw a significant 22% increase. The marathon contributed a record-breaking $683 million to the economy of the Chicago Metropolitan Area. This infusion of funds resulted in a surge in tourism and job creation in the region.
news.headline: 2024 Chicago Marathon brings record $683 million boost to city's economy, up 22% from previous year, creating jobs and boosting tourism.

news.summary: DATAMYTE, a leader in manufacturing technology, has improved its Digital Clipboard platform by incorporating AI to aid in transforming manual forms into personalized digital workflows for clients. The company, based in PLYMOUTH, Minn., announced this enhancement on June 12, 2025. This upgrade is set to streamline processes and boost efficiency for users of the platform.
news.headline: Datamyte integrates AI into Digital Clipboard to convert manual forms to digital workflows for clients. PLYMOUTH, Minn., June 12, 2025.

news.summary: Bleximenib, a selective menin inhibitor under investigation, is demonstrating promise as a combination therapy for addressing relapsed or refractory Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) as well as newly diagnosed AML patients who are unable to undergo intensive chemotherapy. Phase 1b data reveals a low incidence of differentiation syndrome and no concerning cardiac safety signals related to QTc. The study suggests that Bleximenib could be a valuable component in treatment regimens for these populations, offering hope for improved outcomes in those battling this challenging disease.
news.headline: Promising results for Johnson & Johnson's bleximenib in combo with venetoclax and azacitidine for AML. Low side effects in Phase 1b trial.

news.summary: In Princeton, Indiana, on June 12, 2025, Toyota Indiana commemorated a notable achievement as they produced their 1 millionth hybrid vehicle at the Princeton plant. This milestone signifies a significant accomplishment for the heartland of the U.S. where the vehicle was manufactured. The celebration was marked by the symbolic event of the 1-millionth hybrid vehicle rolling off the production line, exemplifying Toyota Indiana's dedication to sustainable transportation. This achievement reinforces their position as a leading manufacturer of hybrid vehicles and highlights their commitment to environmental responsibility and innovation in the automotive industry.

news.summary: Joshua Corman from the Institute for Security and Technology emphasized the interconnectedness of essential services, stating that the loss of power impacts access to water, which in turn affects the operation of hospitals. The statement underlines the critical nature of these lifeline functions. In Washington on June 12, 2025, Craig Newmark made a significant announcement related to CRITICAL EFFECT DC, but did not specify the details regarding the announcement.
news.headline: $3.2 million from Craig Newmark Philanthropies boosts IST's UnDisruptable27 initiative to secure critical infrastructure.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on June 12, 2025, SkyFi and ICEYE US revealed their partnership to integrate ICEYE US synthetic aperture radar (SAR) data into SkyFi's Earth observation platform. This strategic collaboration signifies a deepening bond between the two companies and aims to enhance the capabilities of SkyFi's platform by incorporating high-quality SAR data from ICEYE US. This move reflects a significant step forward in leveraging advanced technology for Earth observation.
news.headline: Partnership between SkyFi and ICEYE US integrates SAR data into Earth observation platform, expanding collaboration.

news.summary: A new facility has been established in IRON RIDGE, Wisconsin on June 12, 2025, by PS Seasoning and Pro Smoker. This hub aims to improve rapid prototyping processes and increase production capacity to cater to the growing need for personalized flavor solutions. Both renowned for their expertise in flavor innovation and equipment provision, the companies are addressing heightened demand by investing in this new venture.

news.summary: In response to the increasing aging population in the United States, Mercy and Humana have collaborated to establish new specialized primary care clinics, known as 65 Prime+ by Mercy Primary Care, designed to cater to patients aged 65 and above. These clinics aim to streamline healthcare access for the elderly population, with a focus on meeting the unique needs of older patients. The initiative seeks to enhance the quality of care for individuals as they age, addressing their healthcare requirements effectively.
news.headline: Mercy and Humana partner to open 65 Prime+ clinics in Missouri, offering specialized care for patients 65+.

news.summary: In London on June 12, 2025, Peymo Ltd, a UK fintech company, unveiled the global debut of an innovative digital finance platform - the world's pioneering AI-enhanced multi-hybrid bank. This advanced platform from Peymo Ltd marks a significant milestone in the financial technology sector, showcasing cutting-edge integration of fiat banking services with AI capabilities. This launch establishes new benchmarks by introducing a seamless and comprehensive banking experience for users.
news.headline: Peymo Ltd launches world's 1st AI-powered multi-hybrid bank, integrating fiat banking, UK-based fintech innovator.

news.summary: In order to effectively manage the challenges posed by construction delivery, early planning and innovative techniques such as prefab and self-perform are essential. The city of REDWOOD CITY in California recorded these challenges on June 12, 2025. Permitting delays, utility constraints, fluctuating material prices, and tariffs are among the obstacles faced in the construction industry. These issues highlight the importance of adopting new strategies to navigate the volatile conditions. The incorporation of prefab construction methods and self-performing tasks are crucial for companies looking to mitigate risks and ensure successful project completion. By embracing these advancements, construction firms can adapt to the ever-changing landscape and enhance efficiency in their operations.
news.headline: Labor shortages contribute to construction uncertainties, per DPR's Q2 report. Prefab and self-perform vital in volatile market.
